    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    BadUserInputException
    Indicates that the user has provided a bad input.
    IntLimitedPrompt
    Prompts for an integer.
    IntPrompt
    A prompt for an integer.
    Loan
    Represents a loan that has been placed by someone for something.
    LoanManagmentSystem
    Core class for managing loans.
    Menu<T>
    The behaviours of a menu.
    MenuAction
    What a menu does.
    Prompt<T>
    Defines the behaviour of a prompt.
    SelectionMenu
    A menu that allows the user to perform actions using through selections.
    StringPrompt
    A prompt for a string.
